spec.name: Barrier Ring
spec.summary: Releases a shimmering barrier of ethereal energy that momentarily repels any negative influence directed at an object.
spec.effect_description: Releases a shimmering barrier of ethereal energy that momentarily repels any negative influence directed at an object. A pentagon counter/affect recipe that channels soul discipline into soul output. It applies a ring pattern against object across anchored reach with immediate persistence.
spec.notes: Generated automatically from randomized sigil variables.
